name: arkadaz
description: Harness engineering and code quality skills for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: tiger-skills
plugins.description: Harness engineering + code quality skills. 16 skills, 12 agents, 8 hooks, 2 commands, and a deterministic multi-agent workflow with a dedicated E2E engineer (E2E authored + re-run every pass), adversarial correctness + security review, and a cartographer keeping CODEBASE_MAP.md (Mermaid code-flow maps) current after every feature.
